goal: Phase 1 trigger-first revision-first local state model for Orun
notes: Task 0019 (M5.c `orun status / logs / describe / get plans` revision-first rewire) verified PASS and merged on 2026-05-30 via PR #163 squash-commit `73108ee` on `main`. Verifier head SHA on PR was `cb33a8e` (verifier report + spec proposal commit on top of `fb364f1`). Both required CI checks PASS at log level on the final head SHA: `CI / Orun Plan` SUCCESS (real `orun plan --from-ci github` step rendered Revision `rev-github-pull-request-fb364f1-pbfd83933`, plan artifact uploaded), `Harness dry-run guard` SUCCESS (30+ `[guard] PASS:` assertions, `DRY-RUN GUARD PASSED`). Coverage gates held: statestore 95.7%, revision 90.4%, executionstate 90.0%.

Verifier walks confirmed: (a) fresh revision-first workspace happy path across all four read commands + new flags (`--revision`, `--exec-id`, `--all` on status/logs); (b) legacy-only synthesized workspace fell back transparently across status, logs, describe run, get plans; (c) `bridge-mirror-failed` surfacing — single-line stderr warning per execution, dedup on multi-event, silent on malformed body, silent on no events, exit code unchanged; (d) describe execution aliases + triplet (revisionKey/executionKey/legacyExecID) printed; (e) `get plans -o json` stable key order with legacy fallback returning `[]`.

One non-blocking spec drift filed as `ai/proposals/task-0019-spec-update.md` (PASS-with-followup): `cli-surface.md` §5.1 documents `describe revision latest` / `describe trigger latest` / `describe trigger <triggerName>` as canonical, but the resolver lacks a `latest`-literal branch and a trigger-name lookup branch. Workarounds available today (empty-arg, explicit revision key). Recommendation: fold Option A normalization (`ref=="latest" → ref=""`) and Option B trigger-name lookup into M5.d scope; the resolver-side change crosses an `internal/revision` boundary that should be reviewed with full M3/M4 context.

Risk Notes carried forward into M5.d / M6: (a) MirrorModeHardlink debug-fold decision deferred to M6. (b) emitFailure best-effort dropped events: M5.c surfaces them as one-line stderr warnings via `bridge_mirror_warn.go` (filename-based detection, payload-shape-agnostic); future iterations could parse `data-model.md` §9.1 fields. (c) Event-sequence retry budget of 32 acceptable for Phase 1. (d) `internal/executionstate` coverage at exact 90.0% floor — must not regress in M5.d. (e) RunnerHooks.AfterStateUpdate sync mirror on runner goroutine — carry into M5.d / M6. (f) New: describe alias `latest`-literal + trigger-name resolver gap (per `ai/proposals/task-0019-spec-update.md`).

Next = **Task 0020 (M5.d) implementer** — hidden `orun state migrate` command per `specs/orun-state-redesign/compatibility-and-migration.md` §5. Closes M5 and unlocks M6 (E2E + property gates). Recommended scoping nudge: roll the `describe revision/trigger latest` + trigger-name lookup remediation from `ai/proposals/task-0019-spec-update.md` into M5.d's scope (small CLI-side normalization for `latest` literal; resolver-side trigger-name branch).

Persistent local environment quirk (NOT a regression): `kiox -- orun plan --changed --intent examples/intent.yaml` fails on composition-cache resolution (`stack.yaml at .orun/cache/compositions/<hash> has no spec.compositions`). Reproduced again on Task 0019 verifier pass. CI is authoritative.
